summary: Frontend-only smoke test of Arrow Strike 2D canvas game. All requested UI flows verified: main menu load, start gameplay, HUD initialization, canvas interactions (mouse aim/draw/release), pause/resume, menu return, sound toggle, and actual scoring via sustained shooting (Score 0 -> 25, Hits 1/10). No console errors.
passed: Main menu loads with 'Arrow Strike' title (game-title)
HUD initial values: Score 0, Level 1, Hits 0/10, 3 lives (rendered as heart icons)
Canvas (game-canvas) visible and responds to mouse events without errors
pause-button opens paused overlay; resume-button returns to playing
menu-button returns to main menu (Start Game visible again)
sound-toggle can be toggled off/on without errors
Sustained shooting increments score (0 -> 25) and hits (0 -> 1/10) confirming end-to-end gameplay loop
Zero console errors / page errors during entire flow
notes: hud-lives data-testid element contains only icon children (3 hearts visible in screenshot), so text_content() is empty. This is by design, not a bug.
Backend testing intentionally skipped per request (pure frontend game).
